# type

**Instance Property**

A type with an identifier that matches a value in the app’s configuration.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var type: UTType { get set }
```

## Discussion

Provide a `UTType` symbol name and description in your app’s `Info.plist` file.

## Configuring an item

- **overrideTitle**: A string to use to override the title of the item’s type.

items.description: A string to use to override the title of the item’s type.
items.name: overrideTitle

title: type
